features.name: abc9_box whitebox module with specify timing block
features.description: Code should include a module marked with abc9_box and whitebox attributes containing a specify block with timing delays

features.name: parameterized bit shift with concatenation as shift amount
features.description: Code should include a parameter used in a bit shift operation where the shift amount is a concatenation of multiple signals

features.name: multi-bit assignment from arithmetic with inversion
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment receiving an arithmetic expression that uses logical inversion on a operand
features.snippet:
wire q0, q1;
assign {CO, SO} = q0 + !q1 + CI;
